thesis: Reason for Entry: Apple has strong brand loyalty and steady services revenue. Main Risk: Slower iPhone growth could limit upside. Exit Plan: Review if growth weakens for multiple quarters.
Reason for Entry: AI demand and data center growth support strong momentum. Main Risk: Valuation is high and expectations are aggressive. Exit Plan: Trim if momentum breaks or earnings disappoint.
Reason for Entry: Microsoft has cloud growth and strong enterprise demand. Main Risk: Cloud growth could slow if business spending weakens. Exit Plan: Hold unless fundamentals weaken.

Reason for Entry: Tesla has upside if EV demand and autonomy expectations improve. Main Risk: Margins and competition remain major concerns. Exit Plan: Exit if price falls below risk level or thesis weakens.
Reason for Entry: Coca-Cola provides defensive exposure and steady dividends. Main Risk: Slow growth may underperform stronger sectors. Exit Plan: Keep unless dividend strength weakens.
Reason for Entry: AMD looked oversold with possible semiconductor rebound. Main Risk: Competition from Nvidia could limit recovery. Exit Plan: Sell near target or if chip momentum fades.
Reason for Entry: JPMorgan has strong banking fundamentals and dividend stability. Main Risk: Interest rate changes could pressure margins. Exit Plan: Hold while earnings remain stable.
Reason for Entry: SPY gives broad market exposure and lowers single-stock risk. Main Risk: Overall market weakness could drag returns. Exit Plan: Hold as benchmark position.

Reason for Entry: Meta has strong ad revenue and AI-driven engagement potential. Main Risk: Regulatory pressure and heavy AI spending could hurt margins. Exit Plan: Trim if growth slows or costs rise too quickly.
Reason for Entry: Nike appeared undervalued after weak sentiment. Main Risk: Brand turnaround may take longer than expected. Exit Plan: Close if recovery thesis does not show progress.
